intent: Get a machine-readable list of everything the tool can do (offline, no creds)
stdout:
{
  "tool": "caption",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "contract_version": "1",
  "commands": [
    {
      "name": "doctor",
      "help": "Probe available Caption features",
      "usage": "caption doctor [--strict] [--clerk-api-key TOKEN] [--org-id ORG]",
      "notes": [
        "Probes Caption API core support and hosted history Markdown support.",
        "Failed probes print their reason to stderr; pass --strict to also exit non-zero.",
        "Use --output json for the full structured result: {organization, features, probes}."
      ],
      "example": "caption --output json doctor --strict",

intent: Determine which features are actually usable right now via a structured strict health probe
stderr:
doctor: probe 'core' failed: Missing Caption API URL. Set CAPTION_API_URL
doctor: probe 'agentsview' failed: Missing Clerk API key (--clerk-api-key or CLERK_API_KEY)

intent: Confirm the tool itself is healthy: non-strict doctor should exit 0 even with features down
